steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject "Some historians" needs a finite verb to complete the main clause before the that-clause about tulip mania. Nonfinite forms cannot serve as the main verb here.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is a present participle, C is a perfect participle, and D is a to-infinitive. Each leaves the subject without a finite main verb. The answer is B.
